title: Release Artifact Receipt v0.1
description: Receipt linking a canonical release artifact to its generated install surfaces. Produced by the Distribution Spine for each release.

packageId.description: Identifier of the package as defined in the package identity registry.

version.description: SemVer-compatible version string of the release.

artifactUrl.description: Canonical URL of the release artifact.

sha256.description: SHA-256 checksum of the release artifact.

sbomPointer.description: Pointer (URL) to the Software Bill of Materials for this release.

provenancePointer.description: Pointer (URL) to the provenance attestation for this release.

generatedSurfaces.description: List of downstream install surfaces generated from this release artifact.

repository.description: Repository hosting the generated surface (e.g. hummbl-dev/homebrew-tap).

commitSha.description: Commit SHA of the generated surface update in its repository.
